answer:
The question asks for the lower limit of the average IOP that can be expected 95% of the time, which refers to the lower bound of a 95% confidence interval for the mean. With a sample mean of 30, standard deviation of 1, and sample size of 100, the standard error is 0.1. The lower limit is approximately 30 - (1.96 × 0.1) ≈ 29.8, so the closest option is 28.

\boxed{A}
